contracts.risk: A full-card overlay can block pointer and touch interaction with the embedded map.
assertions: The page contains exactly one .map-live-frame iframe.
The iframe URL is an HTTPS Google Maps embed with output=embed.
The iframe remains keyboard reachable and must not use tabindex=-1.
The full-card .map-live-link overlay does not receive pointer events.
The visible Google Maps badge and route panel remain clickable.

contracts.risk: Calling video.load() without an explicit playback recovery can leave the hero on a static poster in mobile Chrome.
assertions: The hero contains exactly one muted, looping, inline autoplay video.
The video source is a local MP4 asset.
Playback is retried on canplay, page visibility restoration and first pointer interaction.
Unexpected pauses trigger playback recovery while the page is visible.

contracts.risk: An overly opaque hero overlay or missing light-section backgrounds can make the entire landing appear black.
assertions: The hero overlay maximum alpha does not exceed 0.78.
The hero video has a brightness filter of at least 1.0.
About and visit sections retain the paper background.
The gallery retains the cream background.
Only designated contrast sections use the dark palette.
